public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WPF.​DownloadProgressWindow

Interaction logic for DownloadProgressWindow.xaml.  Window that shows while SparkleUpdater is downloading the update for the user.

DownloadProcessCompleted
public event DownloadInstallEventHandler? DownloadProcessCompleted

Event to fire when the download UI is complete; tells you if the install process should happen or not
